name: Semiconductor and Related Device Manufacturing
rationale: Lowest-but-passing — high ODI (6.21, cert dossier + ITIC ride-through underserved) but lowest feature fit (4.69 — Mein Solar features designed for energy markets, not millisecond ride-through), worst constraint sheet (3.5; 6 mitigable inc. 1 high CAPEX-narrative + 4 medium FM Global), worst VN position (3.0 deep component). No fab reference = effectively blocked.
